zh.Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內
zh.Calne, Wiltshire, Englaind: 英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Blake於1436年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內時，他的父親Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.24歲，母親Avice Wallop20歲。他於大約1459年與Maude在英國英格蘭哈普爾安多福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1515年12月11日在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Blake于1436年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾卡爾內时，他的父亲Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.24岁，母亲Avice Wallop20岁。他于大约1459年与Maude在英国英格兰哈普爾安多福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1515年12月11日在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (England and central Scotland): variant of Black 1, meaning ‘swarthy’ or ‘dark-haired’, from a byform of the Old English adjective blæc, blac ‘black’, with change of vowel length.

English: nickname from Middle English blak(e) (Old English blāc) ‘wan, pale, white, fair’. In Middle English the two words blac and blāc, with opposite meanings, fell together as Middle English blake. In the absence of independent evidence as to whether the person referred to was dark or fair, it is now impossible to tell which sense was originally meant.
English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English bleik, blaik>, blek(e) (Old Norse bleikr) ‘pale or sallow’ (in complexion).

variants.name: Bleak
meanings: English: mostly a variant of   Blake  , but perhaps also of   Blick  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

variants.name: Blaikie
meanings: Scottish: nickname from a pet form of   Blake  .

variants.name: Blakes
meanings: English: variant of Blake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Blake was born in 1436, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., was 24 and his mother, Avice Wallop, was 20. He married Maude about 1459, in Andover, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 11 December 1515, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Blake est né en 1436, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., avait 24 ans et sa mère, Avice Wallop, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maude environ 1459, à Andover, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1515, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Blake 1436 in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. 24 und seine Mutter Avice Wallop 20. Er hat um 1459 in Andover, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Maude geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1515 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Blake è nato il nel 1436 nel Calne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Avice Wallop, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maude circa 1459, nel Andover, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 11 dicembre 1515, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Blakeが1436年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンで生まれた時，父Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.は24歳，母Avice Wallopは20歳であった。約1459年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアアンドバーでMaudeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1515年12月11日に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Blake(이)가 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 캘니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Wallop(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 앤도버에서 Maude(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1515년 12월 11일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Blake nasceu em 1436, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Avice Wallop, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude aproximadamente 1459, em Andover, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1515, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Blake родился в 1436 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Avice Wallop, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude около 1459 г. в местности андовир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 11 декабря 1515 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Blake nació en 1436, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., tenía 24 años y su mamá, Avice Wallop, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maude aproximadamente 1459, en Andover, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1515, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
